product_design_handshake.target_user: solo freelancers choosing one next action from scattered project signals
product_design_handshake.core_workflow: capture one signal, commit the next safe step, then return to continue the trail
product_design_handshake.core_emotional_job: make ambiguity feel navigable without pretending the whole route is known
product_design_handshake.repeat_use_moment: return after a client reply to continue the same commitment trail
product_design_handshake.monetization_boundary: advanced branch comparison and multi-plan planning pack
launch_bar: Activation must prove one signal becomes one next commitment
Core loop must show trail continuation and evidence margin
Money boundary must be a locked branch, not a surprise modal

design_implications.product_fact: Activation starts with only one signal
design_implications.design_consequence: Use a FogPrompt instead of onboarding cards

design_implications.product_fact: Core workflow is choosing one next action
design_implications.design_consequence: A CommitmentRail dominates the core screen
EvidenceMargin attaches reasons beside each step
ReturnMarker shows the previous commitment and next branch

design_implications.product_fact: Paid value is advanced planning branches
design_implications.design_consequence: BranchLock shows monetization boundary as locked branch with rationale

design_implications.product_fact: Zero data is common for new users
design_implications.design_consequence: TrailEmptyState asks for one signal and explains why

why_not_interchangeable: commitment rail sequence is specific to turning signals into decisions
evidence margin makes reasons visible beside each step
locked branch monetization maps directly to advanced planning

screen_shapes.why_this_shape_matches_task: choice plus rationale must remain visible

screen_shapes.composition_shape: open trail space plus one-signal repair
screen_shapes.why_this_shape_matches_task: zero data still teaches the workflow

screen_shape_uniqueness_test.repeated_formula_risk: low because states change rail, margin, and branch composition for product reasons

approval.rationale: Fixture carries app-specific references, synthesis, tone, design system, prototype, and native review evidence without generating a second app.
